text: The B.E. Computer Science and Engineering with Specialization in Cyber Security (CSCS) is an undergraduate engineering degree program focused on equipping students with the knowledge and skills needed to protect computer systems, networks, and data from cyber threats and attacks.
To develop experts in the field of information security, ethical hacking, and digital forensics.
1. Specialized Curriculum 2. Hands-on Learning 3. Legal and Ethical Foundations 4. Emerging Technologies
1. Government & Defense Agencies 2. IT and Cyber Security Firms 3. Banks and Financial Institutions 4. Healthcare and Insurance Companies 5. E-commerce and Cloud Service Providers

Duration: 4 years (Regular) / 3 years (Lateral Entry) No. of Semesters: 8 (Regular) / 6 (Lateral Entry) Intake / No. of Seats: Total - 30 (Government - 15, Management - 15). Eligibility: 10+2 system of Education.
To be a centre of excellence for transforming students into proficient Cyber Security Specialists through sustainable practices.
M1. Impart core fundamental knowledge in Cyber Security. M2. Inculcate critical thinking. M3. Cultivate all-round competencies.

1. Graduates will be prepared for analysing, designing, developing and testing software solutions. 2. Graduates will be skilled in the use of modern tools for critical problem-solving. 3. Graduates will be prepared with managerial and leadership skills.
Engineering Graduates will be able to: 1. Develop creative solutions by adapting emerging technologies. 2. Apply knowledge to develop software solutions and mobile apps.

1. Engineering Knowledge 2. Problem Analysis 3. Design/Development Of Solutions 4. Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems 5. Modern Tool Usage 6. The Engineer and Society 7. Environment and Sustainability 8. Ethics 9. Individual and Team Work 10. Communication 11. Project Management and Finance 12. Life-long Learning
With more data moving online and increasing cyber threats, the demand for cyber security experts is projected to rise.
1. Personal Data Protection Bill. 2. Digital India and Smart Cities initiatives. 3. CERT-In and NCIIPC enhancing cyber security protocols.

1. Cyber Security Analyst 2. Security Architect 3. Penetration Tester 4. SOC Analyst 5. Cloud Security Specialist 6. Cyber Security Consultant 7. Incident Responder 8. Cyber Security Engineer 9. CISO 10. IoT Security Expert
1. Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) 2. Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP) 3. Certified Information Security Manager (CISM) 4. Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP)
1. CompTIA Security+ 2. Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH) 3. CISSP 4. Certified Cloud Security Professional (CCSP)
LinkedIn Learning, Cyber Security Podcasts, Cyber Security Communities, and suggested books for further reading.
1. IT and IT Services 2. Financial Services and Fintech 3. E-Commerce 4. Government and Defense 5. Telecommunications 6. Healthcare 7. Cloud Services
